pr.title: Record: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-11 + BigramHash3072x112 (mean 1.1156)

output.summary: Single-pass run uses AR self-generated GPTQ with XSA on all 11 layers plus BigramHash 3072x112, while Muon Newton-Schulz TTT adds entropy-based epochs.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not a dedicated validation-shard training regime; TTT runs on evaluation chunks but is not marked as val-only training.
techniques: XSA across all 11 layers with BigramHash 3072x112
Muon Newton-Schulz TTT with entropy-based epoch gating
